mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)
SELECT COUNT(*)

WITH V_TEMP1 AS ( SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN AP.AP_USE = 'N' THEN '사용안함' WHEN AP.AP_USE = 'Y' THEN '사용함' END AS AP_USE_NM , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') NOW_DATE , CASE WHEN AP.AP_DEADLINE = 'N' THEN '진행중' WHEN AP.AP_DEADLINE = 'Y' THEN '마감' END AS DEADLINE , AP.* , P.PM_NAME , U.UI_NAME , CS.SC_CODENM AS TYPENAME ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY AP.AP_KEYNO ORDER BY AP.AP_KEYNO) AS RN FROM t_applicaiton_manager AP LEFT JOIN t_place_manager P ON AP.AP_PLACE = P.PM_KEYNO LEFT JOIN u_userinfo U ON AP.AP_REGNM = U.UI_KEYNO LEFT JOIN t_applicaiton_discount_select ADS ON AP.AP_KEYNO = ADS.AP_KEYNO LEFT JOIN s_common_code_sub CS ON AP.AP_TYPE = CS.SC_KEYNO WHERE AP_USE != 'D' AND AP.AP_KEYNO = #{AP_KEYNO} ORDER BY AP.AP_KEYNO DESC ) A WHERE A.RN = 1 ) , V_TEMP2 AS ( SELECT LISTAGG(AD_KEYNO,',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY AD_KEYNO) AS AD_KEYNO ,AP.AP_KEYNO FROM t_applicaiton_manager AP LEFT JOIN t_place_manager P ON AP.AP_PLACE = P.PM_KEYNO LEFT JOIN u_userinfo U ON AP.AP_REGNM = U.UI_KEYNO LEFT JOIN t_applicaiton_discount_select ADS ON AP.AP_KEYNO = ADS.AP_KEYNO LEFT JOIN s_common_code_sub CS ON AP.AP_TYPE = CS.SC_KEYNO WHERE AP_USE != 'D' AND AP.AP_KEYNO = #{AP_KEYNO} GROUP BY AP.AP_KEYNO ORDER BY AP.AP_KEYNO DESC ) SELECT A.*,B.AD_KEYNO FROM v_temp1 A INNER JOIN v_temp2 B ON A.AP_KEYNO = B.AP_KEYNO

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT AP.* , P.PM_NAME , P.PM_FS_KEYNO , '/resources/img/upload/'||FS_FOLDER,FS_CHANGENM||'.'||FS_EXT FS_PATH , P.PM_SEAT_FS_KEYNO , U.UI_NAME ,MAX(ASM_ENDT) OVER(PARTITION BY AP.AP_KEYNO ORDER BY AP.AP_KEYNO) AS END_DATE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY AP.AP_KEYNO ORDER BY AP.AP_KEYNO) AS RN FROM t_applicaiton_manager AP
LEFT JOIN t_application_schedule_main ASM ON AP.AP_KEYNO = ASM.ASM_AP_KEYNO LEFT JOIN t_place_manager P ON AP.AP_PLACE = P.PM_KEYNO LEFT JOIN u_userinfo U ON AP.AP_REGNM = U.UI_KEYNO LEFT JOIN t_applicaiton_discount_select ADS ON AP.AP_KEYNO = ADS.AP_KEYNO LEFT JOIN s_common_file_sub FS ON P.PM_FS_KEYNO = FS.FS_KEYNO WHERE AP_USE = 'Y' AND AP.AP_TYPE = #{AP_TYPE} AND AP_MN_HOMEDIV_C = (SELECT HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C FROM s_home_manager WHERE HM_TILES = #{apTiles} AND HM_USE_YN='Y') ORDER BY AP.AP_KEYNO DESC ) A WHERE A.RN = 1
SELECT AD.* FROM t_application_discount AD WHERE AD_USE != 'D' AND AD_KEYNO = #{AD_KEYNO} AND AD_TYPE != 'C' ORDER BY AD_KEYNO DESC
SELECT COUNT(*)
SELECT AD.* FROM t_application_discount AD WHERE AD_USE != 'D' AND AD_TYPE != 'C' ORDER BY CASE WHEN AD_DEFAULT_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 WHEN AD_DEFAULT_YN = 'N' THEN 2 END, AD_KEYNO
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_application_schedule_sub WHERE ASS_ASM_KEYNO IN ( SELECT ASM_KEYNO FROM t_application_schedule_main WHERE ASM_AP_KEYNO = #{AP_KEYNO} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_application_participate WHERE APP_AP_KEYNO = #{AP_KEYNO} AND APP_DELYN = 'N'

SELECT ASS.* , SUBSTR(ASS.ASS_ST_TIME, 1,2) AS ST_H , SUBSTR(ASS.ASS_ST_TIME, -2) AS ST_M , SUBSTR(ASS.ASS_EN_TIME, 1,2) AS EN_H , SUBSTR(ASS.ASS_EN_TIME, -2) AS EN_M FROM t_application_schedule_main ASM
LEFT JOIN t_application_schedule_sub ASS ON ASM.ASM_KEYNO = ASS.ASS_ASM_KEYNO
WHERE ASM_AP_KEYNO = #{AP_KEYNO} ORDER BY ASS_ST_TIME

SELECT * FROM t_application_user WHERE APU_UI_KEYNO = #{APU_UI_KEYNO} AND APU_DELYN = 'N'
AND APU_SELFYN = 'Y'

SELECT FS.FS_KEYNO FS_KEYNO1 , FS.FS_ORINM FS_ORINM1 , (FS_FOLDER||FS_CHANGENM||'.'||FS_EXT) SEATBACKGROUND_PATH , FS.FS_PUBLIC_PATH SEATBACKGROUND_PUBLIC_PATH FROM t_place_manager P LEFT JOIN s_common_file_sub FS ON P.PM_SEAT_FS_KEYNO = FS.FS_KEYNO WHERE P.PM_KEYNO = #{AP_PLACE}
